chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT MIRPURKHAS First Appeal No.S-01 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For hearing of M.A No.177/ 2024. 2. For hearing of main case. 12.01.2026 Mr. Sikander Ali Kolachi advocate for the appellant. = Learned counsel for the appellant, under instructions, states that matter stands resolved between the parties; hence he does not press this Appeal. Accordingly, instant First Appeal alongwith pending application is dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE “Saleem” 2
